pages.text: $(bold)Ponder is your real teacher.$() Create ships an animated, narrated guide built into the game. Hover any Create item in your inventory or recipe viewer and press $(bold)W$() — a scene plays showing exactly how the block is used.$(br2)This book gives you the $(italic)why$() and the $(italic)how it connects$(). Ponder gives you the $(italic)exact placement$(). Use both.
pages.title: Ponder

pages.text: $(bold)Two tools to keep on you:$()$(br)$(li)$(create)Engineer's Goggles$() — worn on the head, they overlay a machine's $(italic)speed$() and $(italic)stress$(), and highlight what a block is connected to. Diagnosing anything starts here.$(li)$(create)Wrench$() — rotates blocks, picks them up, and dismantles contraptions cleanly.$(br2)When a build stalls, put the goggles on before you do anything else.
pages.title: Goggles & Wrench
